history.subject: Strata ideal §4-§5: entry-ideal membership is Zariski-local on charts, chart-to-chart transfer via presentation-independence at common basic opens, and the iInf strata ideal with chart evaluation (Nitsure n=0, T12)

Rank-e stratum LANDS as a closed subscheme: strata ideal is quasi-coherent (map_ideal_basicOpen via finite chart covers + denominator clearing), strataData/stratum/stratumι with support = rank-e locus; axiom-clean, build green 8584 jobs (Nitsure n=0, T12)

Stage D of the flattening stratification landed: morphisms with flat constant-rank-e pullback factor uniquely through the rank-e stratum (strataData_le_ker + IsClosedImmersion.lift), the stratum pullback is flat (vanishing relation matrix => free), and pointRank commutes with arbitrary pullbacks (fiberRank_baseChange geometrized); all axiom-clean

Flattening stratification universal property PROVED (n=0, Nitsure §4): flatLocusStratification_universal is sorry-free — rank strata over chart loci (Nakayama chart supply, noetherian rank bound), support = rank locus, flat pullbacks, open rank fibers of flat pullbacks, and unique factorization assembled through the disjoint-cofan colimit; FlatteningStratification cone now 0 sorries

Blueprint: representability of the rank strata (Nitsure §4, n=0). New section with 22 nodes matching FlatteningStratificationUniversal.lean 1-to-1: pullback of matrix presentations to section modules, flat-sections/flat-sheaf bridges, the rank dictionary (stalk rank = point rank, point rank of a pullback), the kernel bound I_e ≤ ker(q) and unique factorization through the stratum, flatness of the stratum pullback, the chart locus W_e with Nakayama chart supply, the rank stratum S_e ⊆ W_e as locally closed subscheme with support the rank-e locus, boundedness and openness of rank fibers, and unique factorization through S_e. Rewrote the proof of thm:flattening_stratification_universal to the completed Lean argument (disjoint open rank pieces of T, piecewise unique lifts, assembly and uniqueness through the coproduct) and marked it \leanok.
Ground: fix stale 'typed sorry' doc-comment on the now-proved pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv (QuotScheme.lean); T12 reconcile
